constants.code:
Null_Listener : constant TCP_Listener :=
  (Socket   => GNAT.Sockets.No_Socket,
   Local    => Aion.Net.Address.Localhost (0),
   Resource => Aion.IO_Resource.Null_Resource,
   Open     => False,
   Name     => US.Null_Unbounded_String);
